formal_object.name: global_feasibility_law
core_equations: r(t+1) = S(r(t), z_obj(t), z_mem(t), z_disc(t), h(t))
q(t) = Q(x(t), z_obj(t), z_mem(t), z_disc(t), r(t), h(t))
Delta(t) in A(z_obj(t), z_mem(t), z_disc(t), r(t), x(t))
(z_obj(t), z_mem(t), z_rel(t), z_disc(t), r(t)) in M_feas

operators.F_obj: object formation and object-state update operator
operators.F_mem: memory retention and admissible update operator
operators.Q: query formation and selective access operator

plain_language: The brain first forms object-like latent states rather than storing raw stimuli directly.
Updates are local and gated, but only some updates are admissible because old geometry must remain viable.
Relation and role structure are downstream lifts from object states, not separate primary codes.
Decision geometry is downstream of object geometry and cannot be arbitrarily compressed back into it.
The whole system is constrained by a global feasibility law that decides which object, memory, relation, and readout states can coexist.
meaning.current_missing_piece: The explicit mathematical form of M_feas and the admissible-update/phase-switching constraint that keeps object geometry and discriminative geometry jointly viable.

empirical_constraints.interpretation: The object manifold clearly exists, but the shared-object-to-discriminative mapping is stuck below the moderate-control ceiling, indicating a missing feasibility constraint rather than a missing local component.

seven_question_mapping.Q3: Constrains the internal decomposition of Z_mem into write/read/persistence strata.
seven_question_mapping.Q4: Constrains F_rel and the stable relational basis.
seven_question_mapping.Q5: Constrains manifold sharing and object identity continuity inside Z_obj.
seven_question_mapping.Q6: Constrains F_disc and Q, and their compatibility with Z_obj.
seven_question_mapping.Q7: Constrains how the abstract tuple (Z_obj, Z_mem, Z_rel, Z_disc, R) projects to real brain regions and 3D topology.

P1.purpose: Freeze and refine Z_obj and the bridge-role atlas.

current_state.name: object_manifold_bridge_role_atlas
current_state.goal: freeze object manifold / bridge / role atlas as a stable substrate
current_state.next_block: P1A atlas consolidation and invariant extraction

P2.purpose: Freeze F_obj, F_mem, A, and write/read separation.

current_state.name: controlled_update_law
current_state.goal: freeze local update law, write-read separation, and admissible update geometry
current_state.next_block: P2A update-law freeze and anti-interference calibration

P3.purpose: Close compatibility between Z_obj and Z_disc under M_feas.

current_state.name: compatibility_geometry
current_state.goal: close shared object manifold -> discriminative geometry compatibility
current_state.next_block: P3A transport/phase geometry formalism and execution block

P4.purpose: Map the formal object to real brain-side falsification and topology.

current_state.name: brain_mapping_and_falsification
current_state.goal: map abstract mechanism to brain experiments, regions, topology, and falsification
current_state.next_block: P4A execute protocol-ready brain-side mapping bundle

formation_process.stage_1: Multimodal inputs are compressed into an object manifold with family and role offsets.
formation_process.stage_2: Local gated plasticity writes fast traces while protected memory preserves old geometry.
formation_process.stage_3: Bridge and role operators organize object states into relational structure.
formation_process.stage_4: A discriminative readout geometry is constructed from, but is not identical to, the object manifold.
formation_process.stage_5: Brain-side regions instantiate the same mechanism family under different topology and parameter regimes.

formation_and_operation_hypothesis.compressed_hypothesis: Brain encoding is formed by controlled local plasticity over a shared object manifold, then lifted by bridge-role operators and read out through a separate discriminative geometry, all under a global viability constraint.

verdict.core_answer: Global feasibility law can now be stated as a formal object: a controlled encoding dynamical system whose state tuple must remain inside a viability manifold M_feas while all updates stay inside an admissible set A.
verdict.next_theory_target: identify an explicit constructive form for M_feas and the admissibility relation A
verdict.next_project_target: keep P3 -> P4 -> P1 -> P2 and use P3 to narrow the structure of M_feas
